description: CompositionSage grey pleated round neck kurta made of 100% cotton, has a loop and button front chest placket, three-quarter raglan sleeves, print along the neck, placket and shoulder, and has split side hemsFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this grey kurta from w! Look ethnically hip in its stylish print, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez, heeled slippers and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
